security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://*.steamstatic.com data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https://raw.githubusercontent.com ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: CS2 inventory & storage unit manager (open source).
bundle.longDescription: Lightweight Rust-based desktop app that connects to your Steam account, displays your CS2 inventory and lets you manage storage units (caskets) — add, remove, and rename items.
